title: torminalis glaberrima
intro: Torminalis glaberrima, also known as the Irish rowan or mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Torminalis glaberrima are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Traditionally, it has been prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
